- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Order Create

`<shopify-connector-mule-4:order-create>`

Creates an order. This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the /admin/api/2021-10/orders.json
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>How long Mule waits for a response to complete before the request times out.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit for the <strong>Response Timeout</strong> field.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>How the connector streams request content to the remote service:</p><p>* <code>AUTO</code> (default)</p><p>Connector automatically uses the best streaming strategy based on the request content.</p><p>* <code>ALWAYS</code></p><p>Connector always streams the request content.</p><p>* <code>NEVER</code></p><p>Connector does not stream the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT

- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Order Delete

`<shopify-connector-mule-4:order-delete>`

Deletes an order. Orders that interact with an online gateway cannot be deleted. This operation
makes an HTTP DELETE request to the /admin/api/2021-10/orders/{order_id}.json endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Order ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Order ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>How long Mule waits for a response to complete before the request times out.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit for the <strong>Response Timeout</strong> field.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>How the connector streams request content to the remote service:</p><p>* <code>AUTO</code> (default)</p><p>Connector automatically uses the best streaming strategy based on the request content.</p><p>* <code>ALWAYS</code></p><p>Connector always streams the request content.</p><p>* <code>NEVER</code></p><p>Connector does not stream the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Order Get

`<shopify-connector-mule-4:order-get>`

Retrieves a specific order. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/admin/api/2021-10/orders/{order_id}.json endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Order ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Order ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>How long Mule waits for a response to complete before the request times out.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit for the <strong>Response Timeout</strong> field.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>How the connector streams request content to the remote service:</p><p>* <code>AUTO</code> (default)</p><p>Connector automatically uses the best streaming strategy based on the request content.</p><p>* <code>ALWAYS</code></p><p>Connector always streams the request content.</p><p>* <code>NEVER</code></p><p>Connector does not stream the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Order List

`<shopify-connector-mule-4:order-list>`

Retrieves a list of orders. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/admin/api/2021-10/orders.json endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>ids</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Retrieve only orders specified by a comma-separated list of order IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>limit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Amount of results to return. The maximum is 250.</p></td><td><p>50</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Since ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Restrict results to those after the specified ID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Created at min</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Show orders created at or after the date specified in this field. The format is <code>2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Created at max</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Show orders created at or before date. The format is <code>2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Updated at min</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Show orders last updated at or after the date specified in this field. The format is <code>2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Updated at max</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Show orders last updated at or before date. The format is <code>2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Processed at min</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Show orders imported at or after the date specified in this field. The format is <code>2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Processed at max</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Show orders imported at or before date. The format is <code>2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attribution app ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Show orders attributed to a certain app, specified by the app ID. Set as <code>current</code> to show orders for the app currently consuming the API.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>status</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>OPEN</p></li><li><p>CLOSED</p></li><li><p>CANCELLED</p></li><li><p>ANY</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Filter orders by their status.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Financial status</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTHORIZED</p></li><li><p>PENDING</p></li><li><p>PAID</p></li><li><p>PARTIALLY_PAID</p></li><li><p>REFUNDED</p></li><li><p>VOIDED</p></li><li><p>PARTIALLY_REFUNDED</p></li><li><p>ANY</p></li><li><p>UNPAID</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Filter orders by their financial status.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Fulfillment status</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>SHIPPED</p></li><li><p>PARTIAL</p></li><li><p>UNSHIPPED</p></li><li><p>ANY</p></li><li><p>UNFULFILLED</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Filter orders by their fulfillment status.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Output Mime Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>MIME type of the payload that this operation outputs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryIterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreIterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-iterable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>How long Mule waits for a response to complete before the request times out.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit for the <strong>Response Timeout</strong> field.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>How the connector streams request content to the remote service:</p><p>* <code>AUTO</code> (default)</p><p>Connector automatically uses the best streaming strategy based on the request content.</p><p>* <code>ALWAYS</code></p><p>Connector always streams the request content.</p><p>* <code>NEVER</code></p><p>Connector does not stream the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Order Reopen

`<shopify-connector-mule-4:order-reopen>`

Reopens a closed order. This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the
/admin/api/2021-10/orders/{order_id}/open.json endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Order ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Order ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>How long Mule waits for a response to complete before the request times out.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit for the <strong>Response Timeout</strong> field.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>How the connector streams request content to the remote service:</p><p>* <code>AUTO</code> (default)</p><p>Connector automatically uses the best streaming strategy based on the request content.</p><p>* <code>ALWAYS</code></p><p>Connector always streams the request content.</p><p>* <code>NEVER</code></p><p>Connector does not stream the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Order Update

`<shopify-connector-mule-4:order-update>`

Updates an order. Note that this operation is not for editing the items of an order. This operation
makes an HTTP PUT request to the /admin/api/2021-10/orders/{order_id}.json endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Order ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Order ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>How long Mule waits for a response to complete before the request times out.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit for the <strong>Response Timeout</strong> field.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>How the connector streams request content to the remote service:</p><p>* <code>AUTO</code> (default)</p><p>Connector automatically uses the best streaming strategy based on the request content.</p><p>* <code>ALWAYS</code></p><p>Connector always streams the request content.</p><p>* <code>NEVER</code></p><p>Connector does not stream the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Product Count

`<shopify-connector-mule-4:product-count>`

Retrieves a count of products. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/admin/api/2021-10/products/count.json endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>vendor</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return the product count by product title.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Product type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return the product count by product type</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Collection ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return the product count by product collection ID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Created at min</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return the product count created after a specified date. The format is <code>2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Created at max</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return the product count before a specified date. The format is <code>2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Updated at min</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return the product count last updated after date. The format is <code>2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Updated at max</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return the product count published after date. The format is <code>2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Published at min</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return the product count published after date. The format is <code>2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Published at max</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return the product count published before date. The format is <code>2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Published status</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>PUBLISHED</p></li><li><p>UNPUBLISHED</p></li><li><p>ANY</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Return the product count with a given published status.</p></td><td><p>ANY</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>How long Mule waits for a response to complete before the request times out.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit for the <strong>Response Timeout</strong> field.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>How the connector streams request content to the remote service:</p><p>* <code>AUTO</code> (default)</p><p>Connector automatically uses the best streaming strategy based on the request content.</p><p>* <code>ALWAYS</code></p><p>Connector always streams the request content.</p><p>* <code>NEVER</code></p><p>Connector does not stream the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Product Create

`<shopify-connector-mule-4:product-create>`

Creates a new product. This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the
/admin/api/2021-10/products.json endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>X Shopify Api Features</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>INCLUDE_PRESENTMENT_PRICES</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Must have a value for include-presentment-prices to return a presentment_prices property.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>How long Mule waits for a response to complete before the request times out.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit for the <strong>Response Timeout</strong> field.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>How the connector streams request content to the remote service:</p><p>* <code>AUTO</code> (default)</p><p>Connector automatically uses the best streaming strategy based on the request content.</p><p>* <code>ALWAYS</code></p><p>Connector always streams the request content.</p><p>* <code>NEVER</code></p><p>Connector does not stream the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Product Delete

`<shopify-connector-mule-4:product-delete>`

Deletes a product. This operation makes an HTTP DELETE request to the
/admin/api/2021-10/products/{product_id}.json endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Product ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Product ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>How long Mule waits for a response to complete before the request times out.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit for the <strong>Response Timeout</strong> field.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>How the connector streams request content to the remote service:</p><p>* <code>AUTO</code> (default)</p><p>Connector automatically uses the best streaming strategy based on the request content.</p><p>* <code>ALWAYS</code></p><p>Connector always streams the request content.</p><p>* <code>NEVER</code></p><p>Connector does not stream the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Product Get

`<shopify-connector-mule-4:product-get>`

Retrieves a single product. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/admin/api/2021-10/products/{product_id}.json endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Product ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Product ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>X Shopify Api Features</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>INCLUDE_PRESENTMENT_PRICES</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Must have a value for include-presentment-prices to return a presentment_prices property.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>How long Mule waits for a response to complete before the request times out.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit for the <strong>Response Timeout</strong> field.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>How the connector streams request content to the remote service:</p><p>* <code>AUTO</code> (default)</p><p>Connector automatically uses the best streaming strategy based on the request content.</p><p>* <code>ALWAYS</code></p><p>Connector always streams the request content.</p><p>* <code>NEVER</code></p><p>Connector does not stream the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Product List

`<shopify-connector-mule-4:product-list>`

Retrieves a list of products. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/admin/api/2021-10/products.json endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Published status</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>PUBLISHED</p></li><li><p>UNPUBLISHED</p></li><li><p>ANY</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Return products with a given published status.</p></td><td><p>ANY</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Since ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Restrict results to those after the specified ID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Created at max</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return products created before a specified date. The format is <code>2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Published at max</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return products published before date. The format is <code>2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Collection ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return products by product collection ID. The format is <code>2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Updated at min</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return products last updated after date. The format is <code>2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Updated at max</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return products published after date. The format is <code>2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Published at min</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return products published after date. The format is <code>2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>limit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Amount of results to return. The maximum is 250.</p></td><td><p>50</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>status</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>ACTIVE</p></li><li><p>ARCHIVED</p></li><li><p>DRAFT</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Return only products specified by a comma-separated list of statuses. Default any</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Created at min</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return products created after a specified date. The format is <code>2014-04-25T16:15:47-04:00</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>ids</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return only products specified by a comma-separated list of product IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>title</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return products by product title.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>vendor</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return products by product vendor.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Presentment currencies</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return presentment prices in only certain currencies, specified by a comma-separated list of ISO 4217 currency codes.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>handle</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return only products specified by a comma-separated list of product handles.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>X Shopify Api Features</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>INCLUDE_PRESENTMENT_PRICES</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Must have a value for include-presentment-prices to return a presentment_prices property.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Output Mime Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>MIME type of the payload that this operation outputs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryIterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreIterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-iterable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>How long Mule waits for a response to complete before the request times out.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit for the <strong>Response Timeout</strong> field.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>How the connector streams request content to the remote service:</p><p>* <code>AUTO</code> (default)</p><p>Connector automatically uses the best streaming strategy based on the request content.</p><p>* <code>ALWAYS</code></p><p>Connector always streams the request content.</p><p>* <code>NEVER</code></p><p>Connector does not stream the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Product Update

`<shopify-connector-mule-4:product-update>`

Updates a product and its variants and images. This operation makes an HTTP PUT request to the
/admin/api/2021-10/products/{product_id}.json endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Product ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Product ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>X Shopify Api Features</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>INCLUDE_PRESENTMENT_PRICES</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Must have a value for include-presentment-prices to return a presentment_prices property.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>How long Mule waits for a response to complete before the request times out.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit for the <strong>Response Timeout</strong> field.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>How the connector streams request content to the remote service:</p><p>* <code>AUTO</code> (default)</p><p>Connector automatically uses the best streaming strategy based on the request content.</p><p>* <code>ALWAYS</code></p><p>Connector always streams the request content.</p><p>* <code>NEVER</code></p><p>Connector does not stream the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Product Variant Count

`<shopify-connector-mule-4:product-variant-count>`

Retrieves a count of product variants. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/admin/api/2021-10/products/{product_id}/variants/count.json endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Product ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Product ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>How long Mule waits for a response to complete before the request times out.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit for the <strong>Response Timeout</strong> field.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>How the connector streams request content to the remote service:</p><p>* <code>AUTO</code> (default)</p><p>Connector automatically uses the best streaming strategy based on the request content.</p><p>* <code>ALWAYS</code></p><p>Connector always streams the request content.</p><p>* <code>NEVER</code></p><p>Connector does not stream the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Product Variant Create

`<shopify-connector-mule-4:product-variant-create>`

Creates a new product variant. This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the
/admin/api/2021-10/products/{product_id}/variants.json endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Product ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Product ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>X Shopify Api Features</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>INCLUDE_PRESENTMENT_PRICES</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Must have a value for include-presentment-prices to return a presentment_prices property.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. The default is to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>How long Mule waits for a response to complete before the request times out.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit for the <strong>Response Timeout</strong> field.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>How the connector streams request content to the remote service:</p><p>* <code>AUTO</code> (default)</p><p>Connector automatically uses the best streaming strategy based on the request content.</p><p>* <code>ALWAYS</code></p><p>Connector always streams the request content.</p><p>* <code>NEVER</code></p><p>Connector does not stream the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Product Variant Delete

`<shopify-connector-mule-4:product-variant-delete>`

Delete a product variant. This operation makes an HTTP DELETE request to the
/admin/api/2021-10/products/{product_id}/variants/{variant_id}.json endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Product ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Product ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Variant ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Variant ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>How long Mule waits for a response to complete before the request times out.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit for the <strong>Response Timeout</strong> field.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>How the connector streams request content to the remote service:</p><p>* <code>AUTO</code> (default)</p><p>Connector automatically uses the best streaming strategy based on the request content.</p><p>* <code>ALWAYS</code></p><p>Connector always streams the request content.</p><p>* <code>NEVER</code></p><p>Connector does not stream the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The outcome of the expression is stored in the <strong>Target Variable</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:BAD_REQUEST
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:CONNECTIVITY
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:NOT_FOUND
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVER_ERROR
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TIMEOUT
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNAUTHORIZED
- SHOPIFY-CONNECTOR-MULE-4:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Product Variant Get

`<shopify-connector-mule-4:product-variant-get>`

Retrieves a single product variant by ID. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
/admin/api/2021-10/variants/{variant_id}.json endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Variant ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Variant ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>X Shopify Api Features</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>INCLUDE_PRESENTMENT_PRICES</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Must have a value for include-presentment-prices to return a presentment_prices property.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams.
